_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: the combined treatment with Nutlin-3 (0–10 μM) and MG-132 (2.5 μM) resulted in a Nutlin-3-dose-dependent increases in the apoptosis rates of the cells
details: Combined Nutlin-3 and MG-132 treatment resulted in Nutlin-3-dose-dependent increases in apoptosis rates
